notes: Authority sources in the manifest are real public sources reviewed on 2026-03-22 with explicit refresh cadence and decay policy.

The package stays narrow to warehouse-layer modeling, physical layout, workload isolation, recovery, and warehouse incident guidance; it rejects adjacent data architecture, integration, BI, software engineering, product strategy, and unrelated infrastructure work.
Shared meta-agent contracts required by issue #96 are documented in the manifest, and fallback behavior is defined for unavailable, stale, or low-confidence responses.

Evaluation coverage includes normal guidance, governance handling, pipeline and model-adjacent failure modes, evidence-backed recommendation quality, out-of-scope rejection, and low-confidence escalation.
Local repository validation was completed with npm run lint and npm test on 2026-03-22.
